title: Custom Partitioners in Hadoop MapReduce
description: The 'lib/partition' directory contains custom partitioners for Hadoop MapReduce. These partitioners, like BinaryPartitioner.java and HashPartitioner.java, extend the base Partitioner<K, V> class to implement unique data distribution strategies. BinaryPartitioner uses a byte subarray, HashPartitioner uses key hash code, and RehashPartitioner rehashes for uniform distribution. They collaborate within MapReduce jobs, directing key-value pairs to appropriate reducers, thus implementing the Partitioner architectural pattern for efficient data processing.
